meta.title: Frameless — Financial Freedom Without Borders
meta.description: Crypto-native super app for digital nomads. Virtual cards, bookings, and eSIM powered by stablecoins.

hero.title: Your Capital. Your Freedom.
hero.subtitle: A unified financial ecosystem for life without borders. Manage virtual cards, book hotels, and activate eSIM with USDT/USDC stablecoins — no hidden conversion fees.
hero.privacy: We respect your privacy. No spam, ever.

ecosystem.title: One App. Everything You Need.
ecosystem.subtitle: Three pillars of borderless life in a single super app.

banking.title: Banking & Cards
banking.description: Forget P2P exchangers. Instant stablecoin transactions at any store worldwide via virtual Visa/Mastercard.

travel.title: Travel & Bookings
travel.description: Access wholesale Net-Rate prices on 180,000+ hotels. Save up to 25% vs retail aggregators.
travel.feature2: Hotels at wholesale prices via Hotelbeds

connectivity.title: Global Connectivity
connectivity.description: eSIM for 200+ countries. Instant activation upon landing — no roaming, no SIM swap.
connectivity.feature2: Pay in stablecoins, activate in seconds

security.title: Invisible Complexity
security.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security with consumer-grade simplicity.
security.userItem2: One-tap transactions, no seed phrases to manage
security.techDescription: TSS (Threshold Signature Scheme) splits your private key across multiple secure environments. No single point of failure — not even Frameless can access your assets without your device.

personas.title: Built For Your Lifestyle
personas.subtitle: Whether you code from Bali or run a business from Dubai — Frameless adapts to you.

it.label: IT Professional
it.title: Focus on Code, Not Banking
it.description: Manage subscriptions, premium co-working access, and instant eSIM activation in every new city.
it.feature1: Auto-pay for SaaS subscriptions in USDC

crypto.label: Crypto Entrepreneur
crypto.title: Protect & Grow Your Portfolio
crypto.description: Tax residency guidance, asset protection from inflation, and international school access in top hubs.

nomad.label: Web3 Nomad
nomad.title: Fiat-Free Lifestyle
nomad.description: Live entirely on crypto. No bank restrictions, DeFi protocol access, and zero-friction spending.

freelancer.label: Freelancer
freelancer.title: Maximize Every Dollar
freelancer.description: Transparent commissions, cost-of-life optimization tools, and geo-arbitrage calculator.
freelancer.feature1: Transparent fee structure — no hidden costs

finalCta.title: Stop Losing Money on Fees
finalCta.subtitle: Join the waitlist and start living without borders.
